name: Aussie Shrimp on the Barbie with Orange Ginge
recipeIngredient: 12 Giant Prawns, shelled and deveined (heads and tails intact)
2 each Green onions, tops and white (minced)
recipeInstructions:
1. Soak a dozen long wooden skewers in water for 30 minutes.
2. Push the skewers through the prawns, lengthwise, from head to tail, with only one prawn per skewer.
3. Combine all ingredients in a saucepan and cook over medium to low heat, stirring until the butter is completely melted.
4. Dip the skewered prawns in the orange sauce and position them on an oiled grill rack about 4 inches above the coals.
5. Baste liberally with sauce and grill for 2 minutes.
6. Turn the prawn over and baste again, cooking for another 2 minutes. Smaller prawns will be done at this point, but continue basting and turning larger prawns until they are pink and cooked through.
7. Remove from heat immediately when done to prevent them from becoming tough or overcooked. Use any remaining sauce as a dip for the prawns.
